item.name: Prodigal Son
item.description:
Rather than follow the standard migratory patterns of his brethren, this wandering wavekin swims to the beat of his own drum, and comes and goes as he pleases.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: Despite having grown to a far larger size than considered necessary for his kind, he continues to roam the waters of the world in search of what a fish would consider a good time, rather than return to his spawning grounds to produce offspring.
